repair_actions: Shadow work audit required before proceeding

metadata.ese_myth: Òtúrúpọ̀n Méjì is the medicine that heals through confronting what is hidden. Poison in right measure becomes cure. The inversion operation here is surgical and sacred — what appears reversed is often being corrected to true orientation. Trust the process.
prescriptions: Create `consent_registry.md`. Log the foundational consent: who authorized this system's existence and operation, in what scope, and with what limits?
Document the consent method: explicit written agreement, signed covenant, or formal authorization record.
Hash the registry and anchor in `receipt_ledger.md` as your consent genesis fingerprint.
Every human principal added to the system must have a signed entry in `consent_registry.md` before they can receive system outputs.
metadata.verify: `consent_registry.md` must exist and contain founding authorization before any operational act. A system without documented founding consent operates without mandate.
metadata.cadence: Per-principal consent entry · Monthly consent status review · Annual consent renewal
